parameters.url: ={{(() => { const base = $env.CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL || $env.CONVEX_URL || $env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing Convex URL env: CONVEX_HTTP_BASE_URL or CONVEX_URL or NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, '').replace(/\.convex\.cloud(?=\/|$)/, '.convex.site'); })() + '/http/session-load'}}

={{(() => { const base = $env.REPLY_API_URL || $env.LLM_REPLY_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing reply URL env: REPLY_API_URL or LLM_REPLY_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, ''); })()}}

={{(() => { const explicit = $env.TELEGRAM_SEND_URL; if (explicit) { return String(explicit).replace(/\/$/, ''); } const base = $env.TELEGRAM_BOT_API_BASE_URL || $env.TELEGRAM_API_BASE_URL; if (!base) { throw new Error('Missing Telegram send URL env: TELEGRAM_SEND_URL or TELEGRAM_BOT_API_BASE_URL or TELEGRAM_API_BASE_URL'); } return String(base).replace(/\/$/, '') + '/sendMessage'; })()}}
parameters.jsonBody: =(() => { const payload = { chat_id: $json.telegram_payload.chat_id, text: $json.telegram_payload.text }; if ($json.telegram_payload.parse_mode) { payload.parse_mode = $json.telegram_payload.parse_mode; } if ($json.telegram_payload.reply_markup) { payload.reply_markup = $json.telegram_payload.reply_markup; } return payload; })()
